commit.subject: LU-8931 obd: fix OBD_ALLOC_POST() macro with do-while
commit.message:
LU-8931 obd: fix OBD_ALLOC_POST() macro with do-while

Enclose OBD_ALLOC_POST() body in do { ... } while (0)
for consistency with other macros.
